info.name: Blacklivery API - Flow-Based Tests
info.description:
Comprehensive flow-wise test collection for Blacklivery Backend.

## Setup Instructions
1. Get Firebase Web API Key from Firebase Console
2. Set `firebaseApiKey` collection variable
3. Run tests in order - each flow builds on previous data

## Test Flows
- **Flow 1**: Rider Registration & Rides
- **Flow 2**: Driver Registration & Operations
- **Flow 3**: Complete Ride Lifecycle
- **Flow 4**: Delivery Flow
- **Flow 5**: Payment & Wallet
- **Flow 6**: Admin Operations

exec: pm.test('Promo code applied or error returned', function() {

item.name: Flow 8: Admin Operations

{

    "userId": "{{riderId}}",

item.description: Note: Run 8.0 first to get admin token.
